input_correction.position: Current inputs no longer contain no_helm_candidate rows; this manifest uses current reference-gap and non-final source-status signals instead.

policy.promotion_rule: no row is ready until provenance is clear and downstream visual/human gates pass
policy.source_boundary: reference ideas and semantic evidence only; Helm output remains generated-owned

semantic_brief.brief: ARCSLN01 is ARCSLN01. It is used as a ARCSLN01. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
semantic_brief.required_shape: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference
safety_invariants: Preserve the S-57/S-52 symbol class; do not substitute a different buoy/beacon/topmark/hazard family.
Preserve load-bearing colours and colour order.
Preserve topmark count/orientation and band pattern when present.
Use provider images as semantic/shape witnesses; Helm output remains generated-owned artwork.

semantic_brief.brief: BCNCON81 is BCNCON81. It is used as a special-purpose beacon used for named local purposes. Required geometry: conical/nun buoy body. Required colours: blue, red, white, blue with horizontal bands/stripes in the listed colour order; vertical bands/stripes in the listed colour order.
semantic_brief.colour_pattern: horizontal bands/stripes in the listed colour order; vertical bands/stripes in the listed colour order
semantic_brief.required_shape: conical/nun buoy body
safety_invariants: Preserve the S-57/S-52 symbol class; do not substitute a different buoy/beacon/topmark/hazard family.
Preserve load-bearing colours and colour order.
Preserve topmark count/orientation and band pattern when present.
Use provider images as semantic/shape witnesses; Helm output remains generated-owned artwork.
Conical/nun buoy rows must not be rendered as can/cylindrical buoy rows.
semantic_brief.use_case: special-purpose beacon used for named local purposes

safety_invariants: Preserve the S-57/S-52 symbol class; do not substitute a different buoy/beacon/topmark/hazard family.
Preserve load-bearing colours and colour order.
Preserve topmark count/orientation and band pattern when present.
Use provider images as semantic/shape witnesses; Helm output remains generated-owned artwork.
